data.content: Implementation complete on branch codex/2f19-overview-annotations at commit 28cedb557f444696776b2b7ea78826f0179fc0ca. Changes: overview now targets roughly eight compact columns across desktop with 8.5rem minimum columns; All Repositories shows full repo-scoped ids; required empty review/shipment columns are injected; shipped beats are hidden; active-state tiles show honest lease age/provider/model/version when metadata exists; mobile header wrapping prevents page-level overflow. Verification passed: bun run lint; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test (247 files, 2665 passed, 11 skipped, 42 todo); bun run build. Browser verification at 1269x985 and 390x844 confirmed required annotated columns present, Shipped column absent, full ids visible in All Repositories, lease rows render, desktop shows 8 overview columns at about 145px each, and mobile document scroll width stays within viewport.
